name: 金句型（命運宣言）
description: 角色用凝練的一句話概括自己的信念或處境，適合截圖傳播。具備格言感和角色辨識度。

examples.drama_title: 申浩男&朱丽岚 | 她是秦家灭门案幸存者，化名寻凶复仇时，遇上深不可测的他。二人在试探中相互吸引[MULTI SUB | FULL]#MiniDrama #精彩大陆短剧
examples.excerpt: What I want I must get / I haven't met anyone who dares to refuse me / Well you've met one today / Until the last moment no one knows the ending / Do you believe in fate / Then leave everything to fate
